name: Lauren Sutton
bio: Lauren Sutton serves as the County Attorney for Camp County, handling criminal prosecutions and providing legal counsel to the county. She is dedicated to serving the residents of Pittsburg and the surrounding community.
campaignPromises: Provide effective prosecution of criminal cases
Protect the legal interests of Camp County
Support victims of crime and their families
Maintain fiscal responsibility in the county attorney's office
Work closely with local law enforcement on public safety
